Ministry of Electronics and Information: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY)

Department for Promotion of Industry and: Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade
Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT)
Department of Industrial Policy and Promotion

rules: MeitY ministry-level records store department as null.
The Admin filter displays null ministry-level departments as Ministry-level programme.
DST records use Ministry of Science and Technology plus Department of Science and Technology (DST).
Unknown organizations are not inferred or renamed.
